title: Patio Magic! 16491 Concentrate: Ideal for Patios, Paths and Driveways (Kills Algae and Lichens), 2.5 Litres
features: Patio Magic! Liquid Concentrate Mould, Algae and Moss Killer can be used on hard surfaces indoor and outdoor, and can be used as a pre-paint fungicidal wash
Patio Magic kills green mould in 2-4 days, and gently cleans the exposed surfaces in the weeks to come
This biodegradable cleaner is suitable to treat your patios, fencing, driveways and all round hard surfaces
Works in a few days, lasts months

Next page 1 Long-Lasting 2 Simple To Use 3 Degrades In Soil 4 Non-Staining Available as concentrate or as a ready to use, battery powered 'Power Sprayer' Long-lasting mould disinfectant for the easy treatment, removal and prevention of green mould, algae and lichens* on hard surfaces without the need for manual scrubbing or pressure washing. Patio Magic! naturally breaks down in soil, works in days and lasts for 6-9 months. Also suitable as a pre-paint fungicidal wash. Patio Magic! Concentrate has been approved for indoor use. * Control of lichens can take from 2 weeks to 6 months. Where can I use Patio Magic! hard surface cleaner? Can be used on a wide range of outdoor surfaces such as patios, tarma/asphalt driveways, painted/glazed pots, garden ornaments, brickwork, masonry, York stone, concrete, greenhouses, conservatories, PVC, caravans and artificial play/sports surfaces. Do I need to jet wash the surface before I apply Patio Magic!? No. Pressure-washing often roughens surfaces, thereby encouraging rapid algal re-growth. Patio Magic! is a dynamic algaecidal detergent which works without the need for manual scrubbing or pressure-washing - and it takes just minutes to apply. When will I see results? The primary function of Patio Magic! products is to kill green mould and algae and lichens you will normally see the results of this within 2-4 days. Some lichens can be very hardy and results may take longer. How long will Patio Magic! help prevent re-growth for? Protection can last for about 6-9 months after the first treatment, subsequent treatments can help extend the length of protection. Areas permanently in the shade, or prone to collecting water will have a reduced period of prevention. When can children and pets return to treated areas? Children and pets can return to the treated areas once they have fully dried.
